title: broughtonia alba
intro: Broughtonia alba, also known as the white broughtonia, is a species of orchid native to tropical America. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Broughtonia alba include relieving coughs, reducing fever, and easing congestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Broughtonia alba can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, with some cultures also using it in traditional remedies, such as teas and poultices.
